sources.title: Google Patents: Computer Vision Deep Learning Search
WIPO: Artificial Intelligence Patent Landscape Report 2024
PatentsView: Computer Vision Patent Filing Trends
IPWatchdog: Computer Vision Patent Litigation Trends

result.summary: The computer vision patent landscape shows 48,000+ active patent families dominated by Samsung, IBM, Google, and Chinese tech giants, with generative AI and vision-language models representing the fastest-growing filing categories at 120% YoY growth.
key_findings: Top patent holders by family count: Samsung (4,200+), IBM (3,800+), Google (3,100+), Huawei (2,900+), and Baidu (2,600+), with Chinese entities filing 52% of all new CV patents in 2023
Vision-language model patents (CLIP, Florence-type architectures) grew 120% YoY in 2023, signaling a strategic shift from task-specific CV to foundation model approaches
Patent litigation in CV remains concentrated in autonomous driving (38% of cases) and medical imaging (22%), with NPE (non-practicing entity) suits accounting for 45% of all CV patent litigation
